reviews.text: Karla was fantastic to work with from beginning to end! She offered to meet with us via Zoom since we live in another state to discuss her offerings and explain the process to us. She showed up early to our venue, provided us with a timeline, and best of all: her photographs are stunning. Hands down the best photographer I've worked with and I'd recommend her to anyone look for professional photos that aren't overly edited.

Karla was the photographer for my outdoor mountain wedding. The photos from the day are amazing and we are so grateful for her work on them. She worked hard getting such a variety of pictures and communicated well with us before, during, and after. Beyond her great photography skills, Karla was kind, warm, and so pleasant to work with! I'd definitely recommend her. Thank you, Karla!

She is so amazing at what she does! All of my friends except for the one that recommended her to me have been a little disappointed with their photos and they paid so much more for their photographer.  She is extremely professional yet warm, and I couldn't be happier with the pictures that she took. She really captured the day and just made it even more special. And also she completed editing and the online album within 4 days from the wedding. Our wedding was short but I still think she would have been just as prompt with a full scale wedding. Hard worker!
Beautiful photographs. I have done several projects with Karla Benitez Wedding Photography and the result is always better than expected. I highly recommend Karla Benitez.
